home.subtitle: Explore. Answer. Win.
home.createWalkDesc: Create a new quiz walk with questions
home.emptyDesc: Create your own or scan a QR code to get started
home.leaderboardEmptyMessage: No one has started this walk yet. The leaderboard appears here as soon as someone begins answering.
home.deleteWalkMessage: "{{title}}" will be permanently deleted for all participants, including all results and sessions. This action cannot be undone.
home.removeSavedMessage: This only removes the shortcut from your phone. The walk stays in the system if you want to join again.
home.deleteWalkError: Couldn't delete the walk. Please try again.
home.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently deletes your account, all walks you created, and all sessions and participant data linked to them. This action cannot be undone.
home.deleteSureMessage: All your data will disappear immediately and cannot be restored.
home.deleteDoneMessage: Your account and data have been deleted.
home.deleteReloginMessage: For security reasons you need to sign in again before the account can be deleted. Sign out, sign back in, and try once more.
home.renameMessage: The alias is only shown to you on this device. It doesn't change the walk's real name.
home.renamePlaceholder: Your own name for the walk
home.sortDistanceUnavailable: GPS is required to sort by distance
home.tagsEditMessage: Choose which tags apply to this walk.
home.tagsEditEmpty: You don't have any tags yet. Create one below.
home.emptyFilteredDesc: Try another tag, or tap All.

manageTags.title: Manage tags
manageTags.empty: You don't have any tags yet
manageTags.emptyHint: Create a tag below and you can use it to organise your walks.
manageTags.deleteMessage: The tag "{{name}}" will be removed from all walks it's on. The walks themselves are not affected.
manageTags.tagAlreadyExists: A tag with that name already exists

results.shareText: I got {{score}}/{{total}} ({{percentage}}%) on the quiz walk "{{title}}"! {{emoji}} Can you beat me?

openWalk.missingId: The link is missing the walk ID.
openWalk.notFound: The walk no longer exists, or you don't have access to it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.syncWalksHint: Fetches your walks from the cloud if they are missing locally
settings.deleteAccountHint: Removes you from the app and deletes all walks you have created. Cannot be undone.
settings.deleteTypeMismatch: Text does not match. Deletion cancelled.

auth.subtitle: Sign in with Google to create your own quiz walks and save them to Google Drive
auth.bottomHint: You can always join walks without signing in
auth.missingNativeMessage: Native Google Sign-In isn't available in this build of the app.
auth.noIdToken: No ID token was returned from Google

scan.webHint:
The camera isn't available in the browser.
Paste the QR code contents, a shared link or a walk id:
scan.pasteLinkMessage: Paste a shared tipspromenaden link or a walk id:
scan.notFoundMessage: The walk couldn't be found online.
scan.offlineMessage: Couldn't fetch the walk. Check your internet connection and try again.
scan.permText: We need camera access to scan QR codes
scan.aimHint: Point the camera at the QR code
scan.savedMessage: The walk has been saved locally.

showQR.hint: Share the QR code with the participants
showQR.copiedMessage: The QR code data has been copied to the clipboard.
showQR.copyError:
Couldn't share the QR code. Copy the code manually:
{{code}}

join.enterNameMessage: You need to enter a name to participate.
join.noSessionError: No session was found for this event.
join.cantStartMessage: Couldn't sign in anonymously. Check your internet connection.
join.sessionActive: Active session — you're joining an ongoing round
join.updatedNotice: The walk was updated by the creator — you have the latest version
join.gpsHint: Make sure GPS is enabled on your device

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
leaderboard.shareUnavailable: Sharing is not supported on this device

badge.cta: Soon you can try it too — watch for Tipspromenaden!

create.optionsHint: Tap the circle to mark the correct answer
create.batteryImportedMessage:
{{count}} questions from "{{name}}" loaded.

Tap the map where you want to place each question, one by one.
create.batteryLanguageSet: Language set to {{flag}} ({{code}}) — change it in the language picker if needed.
create.batteryLanguageUnknown: No language was specified in the file — choose one in the language picker below.
create.cancelBatteryMessage: {{count}} unplaced questions will be discarded. Are you sure?
create.tapToAddHint: Tap the map to add control points
create.importBatteryDesc: Load a .tipspack file and place the questions on the map
create.reuseDesc: Create a new walk using an existing walk's map positions
create.reusePickerHint: The positions will be copied as empty controls. Then import a new question pack or fill in the questions manually.
create.reuseNoneMessage: You need at least one saved walk with control points to reuse positions.
create.reuseSuccessMessage: {{count}} positions from "{{name}}" loaded as empty controls. Import a question pack or fill in the questions manually.
create.reusedBanner: Positions from "{{name}}" — fill in questions manually or import a question pack.
create.batteryMatchedMessage: {{matched}} questions from "{{name}}" matched existing positions. {{remaining}} remain — tap the map to place them.
create.noQuestionText: No question text — tap to edit

stats.title: Your stats
stats.subtitle: Saved on this device only
stats.emptyDesc: Complete a walk or create your own to start filling this page.
stats.footnote: Tip: swipe left to go back to the start.
